repository.name: awesome-design-md-jp
repository.description: 日本語UIをAIエージェントに正しくつくらせるためのDESIGN.md集 (Japanese DESIGN.md collection for AI agents — extending Google Stitch format with CJK typography)

design_systems_location.note: 72 is the count of primary brand/service design systems; 229 includes template files and cross-references

section_2.name: Color Palette & Roles
fields: All colors specified in hex format from computed style

subsections.3.1: 和文フォント (Japanese Fonts) - Gothic, Serif options
subsections.3.2: 欧文フォント (Latin Fonts) - Sans-serif, Serif, Monospace
subsections.3.3: font-family 指定 (CSS font-family declarations with fallback chains)
subsections.3.4: 文字サイズ・ウェイト階層 (Font size/weight hierarchy table)
subsections.3.5: 行間・字間 (Line height and letter spacing)
subsections.3.6: 禁則処理・改行ルール (Line breaking and orphan/widow rules)
subsections.3.7: OpenType 機能 (OpenType features like palt, kern)

section_5.name: Layout Principles
fields: Spacing Scale (XS, S, M, L, XL, XXL tokens)

section_6.name: Depth & Elevation
fields: Shadow levels (0-3 with specific shadow values)
Use cases for each elevation level

section_8.name: Responsive Behavior
fields: タッチターゲット (Touch target minimums)
フォントサイズの調整 (Font size adjustments per breakpoint)

section_9.name: Agent Prompt Guide
fields: プロンプト例 (Prompt examples for AI generation)
Comparison tables (e.g., Zenn vs Qiita, ANA vs JAL)

markdown_format.language_convention: Sections in English, descriptions/values in Japanese
markdown_format.color_specification: All colors in hex format (e.g., #3ea8ff), based on computed style measurements
markdown_format.table_format: Uses Markdown tables for typography hierarchy, spacing scales, elevation levels
markdown_format.metadata: Includes service URL, measurement date, and data source notes

key_characteristics.design_philosophy: Clean, modern, tech-focused with emphasis on readability
key_characteristics.font_primary: -apple-system, system-ui, Hiragino Kaku Gothic ProN, Hiragino Sans, Meiryo
key_characteristics.contrast_with: Qiita - Zenn is simpler, less dense, uses slightly softer text opacity

design_systems_examples.name: ANA (全日本空輸 - All Nippon Airways)

key_characteristics.design_philosophy: Trust, cleanliness, high information density with clear visual hierarchy
key_characteristics.header_style: White background with blue pill-shaped CTAs
key_characteristics.font_primary: Hiragino Sans (Japanese) with extended fallback chain

key_characteristics.design_philosophy: Developer-focused, code-and-prose mixing, high information density
key_characteristics.positioning: Qiita is the established player; Zenn is the challenger

key_characteristics.tagline: お、ねだん以上。(More than the price)
key_characteristics.specialization: EC platform for furniture, interior, lifestyle goods

key_characteristics.award: Good Design Award recipient (2021 digital strategy refresh)

key_characteristics.concept: Street Formal - Feminine elegance + casual street style

key_characteristics.multi_vertical: Uses same UI 'dressed' in different brand colors for 6 verticals (stays, restaurants, spa, outbound, catering, furusato tax)
key_characteristics.font_strategy: Apple system font + radius 6px + 14px base + flat design + card layouts
key_characteristics.color_model: 1 shared UI system + 6 color layers (CSS vars: --color-{stay|res|spa|outbound|otoriyose|furusato}-main)
key_characteristics.approach: Adding new vertical = define main/sub color pair, UI stays same

key_characteristics.design_difference: Black header (vs ANA's white), darker overall tone

key_characteristics.brand_font: Premium Japanese font (FOT-筑紫ゴシック Pr5N D)

for_opengamma.strategy: Federated DESIGN.md Registry with AI-Guided Selection

phases.description: When user creates a new presentation, analyze the content domain to recommend 2-3 most relevant design systems from the registry
phases.implementation: Use LLM to categorize user's project (e.g., 'tech platform' → suggest Zenn, Qiita; 'travel' → suggest ANA, JAL; 'retail' → suggest Nitori, CAINZ)

phases.description: Fetch and parse the recommended DESIGN.md files into opengamma's context
phases.implementation: Cache DESIGN.md files locally, parse sections 1-6 into a structured format, inject into code generation prompts

phases.description: When generating HTML/CSS for slides, inject design system tokens from selected DESIGN.md
phases.implementation: Pass color palette, typography rules, component styles to slide generator as constraints

phases.description: Support 'multi-vertical' approach (like ikyu) for organizations with multiple brand variants
phases.implementation: Allow CSS variables for brand color swapping while keeping UI structure constant

technical_implementation.prompt_injection: Pass tokens as 'DesignSystemContext' to slide generation prompts
technical_implementation.fallback: If no match found, use 'template/DESIGN.md' as baseline

ui_ux_changes.add_to_new_presentation: Step 1 of wizard: 'Choose a design system' with examples
ui_ux_changes.add_to_theme_picker: Link theme colors to selected DESIGN.md primary colors

copyright_licensing.source_license: Check awesome-design-md-jp repo (likely CC0 or MIT for DESIGN.md templates)
copyright_licensing.usage: DESIGN.md files are intended as specifications for AI agents; use them as styling guides, not as copied text
copyright_licensing.attribution: Reference the original designer/brand in generated presentations

japanese_ui_best_practices: Font family fallback chains are critical - must include both Japanese and Latin fonts
Line height for Japanese text should be 1.5-1.8 (wider than English)
Never use pure black (#000000); use slightly lighter colors like rgba(0,0,0,0.82)
OpenType features (palt for proportional punctuation) are optional but add polish
design_system_patterns: Color tokens use semantic naming (Danger, Warning, Success) + brand colors
Component specs include all CSS properties (padding, radius, weight, shadow)
Responsive behavior defined via breakpoints and touch target minimums
Most systems use 6-8 spacing scale tokens (XS, S, M, L, XL, XXL)
Do's and Don'ts sections written for AI agents as constraint rules
competitive_insights: ANA (airline) uses pill-shaped CTAs (#073190) vs JAL's darker, more traditional approach
Zenn (tech platform) prioritizes readability with 1.8 line-height vs Qiita's dense information architecture
ikyu demonstrates 'multi-vertical' pattern: same UI, different brand colors per category
Premium brands (POLA, Aman Tokyo) emphasize minimalism and white space
Retail brands (Nitori, CAINZ) use high-density cards to showcase product inventory

references.about_google_stitch: Google's Stitch is the inspiration - DESIGN.md is an AI-friendly design spec format
references.research_methodology: Extracted from GitHub search results and computed style measurements (2026-05-21 data)
